explanation: This is the original true positive command and serves as a baseline for testing.
Inserted extra space between the flag and the file path to test parsing tolerance.
Removed space between the -f flag and the file path to test minimal syntax acceptance.
Replaced the short flag '-' with '/' to test equivalent syntax substitution.
Inserted a newline character at the end to test parsing behavior with line breaks.
Inserted a tab character at the end to test parsing behavior with whitespace variations.
Inserted a carriage return at the end to test parsing behavior with control characters.
Inserted a hexadecimal representation of space to test encoding bypass techniques.
Inserted a Unicode representation of space to test encoding bypass techniques.
